Voice AI Agent

AI Receptionist

An AI Receptionist answers every inbound call to your business, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. It greets callers in their language, routes them correctly, books appointments into your calendar, and sends your team a WhatsApp summary of every call.

Starting at
₹1.5L setup + ₹20k/mo $3k setup + $400/mo
Languages
Hindi · English · Tamil · Telugu · Kannada · Marathi
Built For
Clinics & hospitalsReal estate officesSalons & spasCA & legal firmsService businesses

What it does

A missed call is a missed patient, missed lead, missed booking. Most service businesses miss 30–40% of inbound calls because phones ring during appointments, after hours, or when the front desk is occupied.

This agent:

  • Answers every call within 2 rings
  • Introduces itself naturally and identifies caller intent
  • Books, reschedules, or cancels appointments directly into your calendar
  • Routes urgent calls to your mobile immediately
  • Sends every call summary to your team via WhatsApp

How it works

Step 1 — Call arrives. Caller dials your existing number. No number change needed. The agent picks up in under 2 seconds.

Step 2 — Intent detection. In the first exchange, the agent identifies: appointment booking, query, directions/hours, complaint, or other.

Step 3 — Resolution. Booking requests go to your calendar in real time. Queries are answered from your knowledge base. Complaints are escalated to a human.

Step 4 — Post-call summary. Every call → 3-line WhatsApp summary to your team: who called, what they wanted, what was done.

FAQ

Common questions about AI Receptionist.

How much does an AI receptionist cost in India?
Setup ranges from ₹1.5L to ₹2.5L depending on call volume and integrations. Monthly retainer is ₹20k, which covers hosting, monitoring, and up to 2,000 calls/month. Compare that to a human receptionist at ₹20–25k/month who works 8 hours a day, 5 days a week.
Can the AI receptionist speak Hindi and regional languages?
Yes. The agent handles Hindi, English, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, and Marathi out of the box. It detects the caller's language in the first 2 seconds and switches automatically. More languages available on request.
What happens when a caller needs a human?
The agent handles routine queries and bookings. When someone is distressed, confused, or explicitly asks for a human, it transfers the call immediately and sends a context summary via WhatsApp to the team.
How long does setup take?
3–4 weeks from signed agreement to live calls. Week 1: call flow mapping and script writing. Week 2: voice training and calendar integration. Week 3: testing with real call samples. Week 4: go live with monitoring.
What if call volume spikes?
The agent handles unlimited parallel calls — 5 callers at once or 500, same response time. You pay per minute of call handled, so cost scales with usage, not headcount.

Ready to deploy AI Receptionist?

Book a 30-minute call. We'll scope your call flows and give you a cost on the call.
